project.name: Project Meridian
project.description: Platform migration from legacy HL7-MLLP integration layer to modern FHIR R4 REST API middleware for Acme Health's patient data exchange network.

organizations.name: Acme Health
organizations.description: Regional healthcare network undergoing platform modernization.

organizations.name: DataBridge Systems
organizations.description: Contracted to design and implement the FHIR integration middleware and data mapping layer.

organizations.name: CloudPeak Infrastructure
organizations.description: Responsible for cloud environment provisioning, security configuration, and network setup.

participants.name: Diana Osei
participants.title: VP of Technology
participants.note: Executive sponsor. Receives weekly status updates from Sarah.

participants.name: Kevin Park
participants.title: Account Manager
participants.note: Primary business contact for DataBridge. Becomes unresponsive after Jan 20.

participants.name: Tom Reyes
participants.title: Solutions Architect
participants.note: Technical lead for DataBridge. Departed the company around Jan 28 — departure not formally communicated to Acme.

participants.name: Aisha Patel
participants.title: Integration Developer
participants.note: Junior developer who takes over Tom's responsibilities after his departure. Not brought up to speed on the revised mapping doc.

known_dependencies.description: DataBridge must deliver approved data mapping document before ETL pipeline build can begin.
DataBridge ETL pipeline build must be complete before CloudPeak can finalize production environment configuration.
CloudPeak production environment must be configured and validated before cutover date.

decisions_log.description: Adopt a phased migration approach: Phase 1 covers read-only FHIR endpoints; Phase 2 adds write endpoints after a 30-day stabilization period.
Revised to single-phase cutover. DataBridge confirmed their middleware can handle full read/write scope simultaneously, eliminating need for a two-phase approach.
decisions_log.note: CloudPeak was NOT present at this meeting and was not formally notified of this decision.

decisions_log.description: Reverted to phased migration. CloudPeak's security configuration for single-phase approach requires an additional two weeks of setup work, making Feb 14 cutover impossible.
